texto: Forgiveness, both its extension and receipt, requires a lower, humble position before both God and man. Forgiveness, both its extension and receipt, is not the natural inclination of man, and I must fight for it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Seth Haines sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Forgiveness, both its extension and receipt, requires a lower, humble position before both God an…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, forgiveness, extension, útil em momentos de reflexao.
